'''CB-99''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] used to keep his [[Jabba the Hutt's Will|will]]. After his [[Death/Legends|death]] shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Zorba Desilijic Tiure]], Jabba's father, reclaimed Jabba's will and everything he owned through the droid.

{{Droid-stub}}

*''[[Zorba the Hutt's Revenge]]'' {{1st}}
